text:
Comment on attachment 194816
thunderbird 52.9.0 candidate2

>  MASTER_SITES=	MOZILLA/${PORTNAME}/releases/${DISTVERSION}/source \
>  		MOZILLA/${PORTNAME}/candidates/${DISTVERSION}-candidates/build1/source

Looks OK except missing build1 -> build2 like you did in -i18n.

=> Attempting to fetch https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/thunderbird/candidates/52.9.0-candidates/build1/source/thunderbird-52.9.0.source.tar.xz
fetch: https://download.cdn.mozilla.net/pub/thunderbird/candidates/52.9.0-candidates/build1/source/thunderbird-52.9.0.source.tar.xz: Not Found

> Between "web browser-alike" and Security cd81806c-26e7-4d4a-8425-02724a2f48af this will me MFH'ed.

Agree. 2018Q2 is still open.
